MaiStorage – Malaysia’s New Storage Technology Solutions Supplier
MaiStorage is a member of Phison group, the world’s leading independent supplier of NAND controller ICs and storage solutions.
Premier Storage Solutions
By leveraging Phison’s proven technology, extensive expertise, and vast experience, MaiStorage excels in delivering premier storage solutions tailored to diverse market needs.
MaiStorage plays a direct role in the development and production of Phison’s aiDAPTIV+ technology, enterprise products, and automotive solutions in Malaysia.
